nameMeanings.name: SOULIS
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Greek: possibly a nickname derived from Albanian shul ‘bolt of wood’, figuratively ‘brawny man’ and ‘tall dolt’.
Scottish (Ayrshire): variant of   Soule  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Shaulis
meanings: Altered form of Lithuanian Šaulys: occupational name from šaulys ‘rifleman’. Compare Soulis .

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Juliana de SOULIS married Gilbert of Tarbolton Fitz RICHER before 1144, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son.
